title: Mariscus pratensis

uses: Mariscus pratensis, also known as cattail or common cattail, has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits. The rhizomes and roots of Mariscus pratensis contain saponins, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. In some cultures, the plant is used to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions.
